requirement.description: The gateway shall combine headlamp, tail lamp, and hazard lamp requests and transmit a consolidated exterior lighting status.

test_cases.title: Verify GW_ExteriorLighting message transmission
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway ECU powered; monitor CAN ID 0x10F
steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_ExteriorLighting message
test_cases.expected_result: GW_ExteriorLighting message is present on the CAN bus

test_cases.title: Verify all exterior lighting OFF results in all status bits = 0
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; headlamp OFF; tail lamp OFF; hazard OFF; monitor CAN ID 0x10F
steps: Ensure all lighting inputs are OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_lgt_002_all_off(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_EXTERIOR_LIGHTING_ID, 2)
    assert msgs, 'No GW_ExteriorLighting messages received'
    for msg in msgs:
        assert decode_headlamp(msg) == 0
        assert decode_tail_lamp(msg) == 0
        assert decode_hazard(msg) == 0

test_cases.title: Verify headlamp ON is forwarded correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; headlamp ON; tail lamp OFF; hazard OFF; monitor CAN ID 0x10F

test_cases.title: Verify tail lamp ON is forwarded correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; tail lamp ON; headlamp OFF; hazard OFF; monitor CAN ID 0x10F

test_cases.title: Verify hazard lamp ON is forwarded correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; hazard ON; monitor CAN ID 0x10F

test_cases.title: Verify combined headlamp and tail lamp ON status
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; headlamp ON; tail lamp ON; hazard OFF; monitor CAN ID 0x10F
steps: Switch headlamp and tail lamp ON

test_cases.title: Verify all exterior lighting ON simultaneously
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; headlamp ON; tail lamp ON; hazard ON; monitor CAN ID 0x10F
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_lgt_007_all_lighting_on(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_EXTERIOR_LIGHTING_ID, 2)
    assert msgs, 'No GW_ExteriorLighting messages received'
    for msg in msgs:
        assert decode_headlamp(msg) == 1
        assert decode_tail_lamp(msg) == 1
        assert decode_hazard(msg) == 1

test_cases.title: Verify GW_ExteriorLighting message DLC
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; CAN monitoring enabled; monitor CAN ID 0x10F

test_cases.title: Verify lighting status updates immediately upon input change
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; all lighting OFF; monitor CAN ID 0x10F
test_cases.expected_result: Corresponding lighting status bit updates in the next message
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_lgt_009_immediate_update(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_EXTERIOR_LIGHTING_ID, 2)
    assert msgs, 'No GW_ExteriorLighting messages received'
    assert decode_headlamp(msgs[-1]) in (0, 1)
    assert decode_tail_lamp(msgs[-1]) in (0, 1)
    assert decode_hazard(msgs[-1]) in (0, 1)

test_cases.title: Verify GW_ExteriorLighting stops transmitting when Gateway ECU is powered OFF
test_cases.precondition: Gateway ECU active; monitor CAN ID 0x10F
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_lgt_010_stop_on_power_off(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_EXTERIOR_LIGHTING_ID, 2)
    assert msgs_before, 'No GW_ExteriorLighting before power off'
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_EXTERIOR_LIGHTING_ID, 2)
    assert not msgs_after
